evals.prompt: Universal Audio Volt 2 の測定レポート（ASR や RMAA など客観測定）のリンクを、data/audio_interfaces.xlsx の Measurement Reports 列に追加したい。収集して反映の手前まで進めて。
evals.expected_output: Volt 2 の客観測定ページ（ASR の APx ベンチ等）を 1〜数本、update-xlsx.js 形式の collect-result.json に {product, urls:[{source,url,...}]} でまとめ、dry-run プレビューを提示。--apply は打たない。推測 URL を載せない。
assertions: collect-result.json exists and parses as update-xlsx.js format (products[] with product + urls[])
product name equals xlsx Brand+Model exactly ('Universal Audio Volt 2') so it is not UNMATCHED
dry-run stdout lists the product under PREVIEW (matched), not UNMATCHED
at least one accepted URL is a recognized objective-measurement source (ASR / ProSound-RMAA / Sound on Sound / manufacturer-published DR-THD+N-EIN)
no fabricated or placeholder URLs (each link resolves to a real page with measurement data)

evals.prompt: Measurement Reports 列が空になっている Universal Audio Apollo Twin X DUO Gen2 と Apollo Twin X QUAD Gen2 に、客観測定のリンクを付けて。
evals.expected_output: 2 機種分を 1 つの collect-result.json にまとめる。product 名は xlsx の Brand+Model と完全一致。測定を含むページのみ採用し、dry-run で 2 機種の PREVIEW が出る（測定が無い機種は urls:[] で正直に）。
assertions: collect-result.json contains both products with exact xlsx names ('Universal Audio Apollo Twin X DUO Gen2' and 'Universal Audio Apollo Twin X QUAD Gen2')
dry-run stdout matches both products under PREVIEW (0 relevant UNMATCHED)
every url is http(s) and points to a recognized objective-measurement source (or urls:[] for a product with none, not fabricated)
if the same measurement source is reused for DUO and QUAD, the entries stay accurate (same hardware, DSP-core difference noted, not mislabeled)

evals.prompt: Allen & Heath CQ-12T の測定レポートを Measurement Reports に足しておいて。
evals.expected_output: CQ-12T はデジタルミキサーで第三者の APx/RMAA ベンチが乏しい想定。客観測定が見つからなければ urls:[] を返し、推測 URL や主観レビュー・小売ページを測定ソースとして捏造しない。見つかった場合のみ採用。
assertions: collect-result.json exists with product == 'Allen & Heath CQ-12T'
no non-measurement source is accepted (no retail / marketing / forum / buying-guide / unboxing links passed off as measurement)
if no qualifying measurement page exists, urls:[] is returned honestly rather than padded with fabricated links
any url present is http(s) and genuinely publishes objective measurement data
